_description: List A — US/EU origin models only (for restricted clients). Copy to ~/.pi/agent/models.json.
_mixed_fleet: For PC + Mac Mini, also add the 'ollama-mac-mini' provider block from models-remote.json into the providers object.
_warning: Only phi3.5:3.8b supports tools in this list. granite-code:8b and phi4:14b do not support tool calling — Pi RAG extensions will be disabled when using those models.

models.name: Phi-3.5 3.8B
models._notes: Only List A model with tool support — US origin; 128K context; limited quality at 3.8B

models.name: Granite Code 8B
models._notes: Fast completions on Laptop / PC fallback — US origin; WARNING: no tool support, RAG extensions disabled

models.name: Phi-4 14B
models._notes: Primary PC model, tight at Q4 on RTX 3080 10 GB VRAM — US origin; WARNING: no tool support, RAG extensions disabled
